demographics.location: WHERE - e.g., US, UK, global English-speaking
demographics.education: LEVEL - e.g., College educated, often self-taught in specialty

professional_profile.experience_level: LEVEL - e.g., 3-10 years in their field
professional_profile.decision_making_power: LEVEL - e.g., Primary decision maker or strong influencer

beliefs: BELIEF 1 - e.g., AI is a tool, not a replacement
BELIEF 2 - e.g., Quality content builds real businesses

primary_problems.problem: PROBLEM 1 - The main challenge they face

frustrations: FRUSTRATION 1 - What annoys them about current solutions
FRUSTRATION 2 - What they're tired of hearing/seeing
fears: FEAR 2 - What keeps them up at night

immediate_goals: GOAL 1 - What they want in the next 30-90 days
long_term_aspirations: ASPIRATION 1 - Where they want to be in 1-3 years
goals_and_desires.dream_outcome: THE DREAM - The ideal result they're working toward

questions_they_ask: QUESTION 1 - A question they frequently have

platforms: PLATFORM 1 - Where they spend time online
content_consumption.attention_span: LENGTH - How long they'll engage with content

common_objections.objection: OBJECTION 1 - Why they might not engage

timing_triggers: TRIGGER 1 - When they're most likely to act

instructions: REPLACE ALL PLACEHOLDER TEXT (in CAPS) with your actual ICP characteristics. Run the icp-creator skill with an interview to generate a personalized version.
